description: Cheerful American female voice, natural and upbeat, slightly slower when speaking Spanish
selectionNotes: Search ElevenLabs Voice Library for: American female, friendly, young adult. Look for a voice that sounds natural and relatable, not overly professional.
notes: Medium stability (0.5) = natural but not too wild. Lower style (0.4) = more neutral American sound. The multilingual model handles her English-to-Spanish transitions well.
